title: Just A Few Pickaxes
description: Do you want some pickaxes? I got some.
body:
Check out the sequel here!: https://modrinth.com/mod/a-few-more-axes

# A New Mod?

This is the Just A Few Pickaxes Mod. I was very bored one day, so I tried my first MCreator Mod.
Planning to port to Forge at some point. Probably not though!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/4IPQXBCQ8Vk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# What's in it?

- Sand Pickaxe: Not very good. Made with sand.
- Glass Pickaxe: One-time use. Cook Sand Pickaxe to get or craft with any glass block.
- Dirt Pickaxe: Wood Pickaxe but not very sturdy. And not very good.
- Clay Pickaxe: Nothing special, really. Maybe a Brick Pickaxe Soon
- Missing Pickaxe: Can break anything, and does it really fast. Crafted with Air.
- Copper Pickaxe: A slightly worse Iron Pickaxe.
- Oxidized Copper Pickaxe: A slightly better Iron Pickaxe. Use the Oxidizer to get.
- Leekaxe: Leekaxe.
- Brick Pickaxe: Basically Stone Pickaxe, smelt Clay Pickaxe to get.
- Daimond Pickaxe Pickaxe: Two is better than one.
- N&N Pickaxe: Made from N&Ns, can be eaten. Not a good pickaxe.
- Mercury Pickaxe: Very Heavy. Explodes on impact (damage not included).
- Emerald Pickaxe: Similar to Diamond.
- Baguette: Kasane Teto.
- Ultimate Pickaxe: A combination of all the Pickaxes. Worse than your fist.
- Lava Pickaxe: A new pickaxe that is just kinda strong, ig.
- Stickaxe: A stick Pickaxe
- Rose Quartz Pickaxe: Similar to Iron.
- Bedrock Pickaxe: When you right click, it turn Bedrock into Mineable Bedrock.
- Villager Pickaxe: Hrrmmm.
- Water Pickaxe: I dare you to use it. You can't!
- Removed Herobrine Pickaxe
## Credits

Thanks to [EddieR5](https://modrinth.com/user/EddieR5) for the idea for the Diamond Pickaxe Pickaxe, and thanks to [Zirosi](https://modrinth.com/user/zirosi) for the idea for the Ultimate Pickaxe.
